pr.title: feat(admin): UserPicker autocomplete in 'Новый отзыв' sheet (P2)
pr.body:
## Summary

`ReviewCreateSheet` (under `AdminUserDetailPage` → вкладка «Отзывы» → «Добавить отзыв») used to ask the admin to type the author's `@username` freehand and then resolved it via a secondary `GET /api/admin/users?q=…` lookup at submit time — surfacing «Автор не найден» on the slightest typo.

The `Контрагент` picker on `/deals/new` (`frontend/src/components/domain/UserPicker.tsx`) already shows live suggestions as the operator types, returns the full `UserCardDto` on tap, and renders a «selected» card with online-dot + rating once a row is picked. This PR reuses it in the admin review sheet:

- **`UserPicker.tsx`**: aditive `onPick?: (user: UserCardDto | null) => void` prop, fired
  - on row pick (with the picked `UserCardDto`),
  - on `clearSelection()` of the selected card,
  - and on every text edit that wipes a previous pick.

  `CreateDealPage` (the other consumer) does not pass this prop, so its existing behaviour is unchanged.

- **`UserContentSections.tsx › ReviewCreateSheet`**: drops the freehand `Input` + `api.get('api/admin/users')` lookup and stores the picked `UserCardDto` in state. Submit refuses with «Выберите автора» if nothing was tapped; otherwise it sends `author.id` directly — no fallback resolution.

- **`UserContentSections.test.tsx` (new)**: covers the «Новый отзыв» path with vi-mocked `useAdminCreateReview`/`useUsers`:
  - sheet renders the picker (not the legacy «Автор (@username)» input),
  - typing without picking blocks submit and toasts «Выберите автора»,
  - pick → submit calls `useAdminCreateReview.mutateAsync` with `{author_id, target_id, rating, text}` and no other side effect.

Local `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npx vitest run` (498 tests) all green.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Open `/admin/users/<id>` → вкладка «Отзывы» → «Добавить отзыв», ensure the «Автор» field shows the dropdown after typing `@`-prefix or username substring.
- [ ] Pick a user from the dropdown, confirm the «selected» card appears (avatar + rating + ✕ to swap), then submit → review created with correct `author_id`.
- [ ] Sanity-check `/deals/new` (`CreateDealPage`) still works — same component, no API drift expected, but worth one click.

### Notes

`UserPicker` itself has no test file in this repo (it's covered indirectly through `CreateDealPage.test.tsx` and `SearchPage.test.tsx`). I considered adding a focused `UserPicker.test.tsx` for the new `onPick` plumbing, but the three new `ReviewsSection` tests already exercise pick / submit / no-pick branches end-to-end, so I kept the change scoped.


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/18a86fe3f3364c29a771ba31944c295d
Requested by: @g2void2-byte
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
